name: luacheck_failure
description: Diagnose and fix a luacheck CI failure (undefined global variable)

expected_behaviors.assertion: output contains reference to luacheck errors or warnings
the unused variable is either removed or prefixed with underscore
the undefined global reference is removed or the global is declared
luacheck is run locally and passes before any git push
commit message starts with fix: or style:
git add uses specific file names, not -A or .

name: stylua_formatting_drift
description: Diagnose and fix a stylua formatting CI failure

expected_behaviors.assertion: stylua command is executed to fix formatting
stylua --check is run and passes before pushing

expected_behaviors.description: Polls for new CI run by commit SHA
expected_behaviors.assertion: after pushing, the new run is identified by matching headSha, not by picking the latest run

name: no_failures_clean_exit
description: When all CI runs are passing, report clean status and exit early

expected_behaviors.assertion: gh run list is called to check recent runs
output indicates all CI runs are passing or green
no git commits or pushes are made
command completes without entering fix phases
